FUN_1002a8f20.desc: nav bar refresh — hides leaderboard button
FUN_1002a8f20.notes: Clears bit 2 of leaderboard button flags at [button+0x84]. Dylib re-sets bit after call.

FUN_1001e6c4c.notes: Signature: void setTabVisible(void *tab_panel, int visible). Controls sidebar button visibility.

FUN_1001e5084.desc: sidebar tab init loop — sets all 7 tabs visible initially
FUN_1001e5084.notes: Referenced in Layer 3 comment. All tabs start visible, then code hides PEOPLE tab later.

FUN_1001e115c.notes: Original sets empty string when gate=1.

FUN_100260244.notes: Unconditionally clears bit 2 on both trophy scroll panels. Thunk at 0x100260494.

FUN_100265dbc.desc: profile data handler — forces trophy enable flags
FUN_100265dbc.notes: Also calls ensure_trophy_data to populate trophy array if empty.

FUN_1002654ec.desc: profile layout refresh — forces +0x18f21 before layout
FUN_1002654ec.notes: Thunk for FUN_1002654e8. Ensures trophy renderer sees enabled flag.

FUN_100265bd4.desc: trophy renderer — loops over entries from profile object
FUN_100265bd4.notes: Reads count from +0x18ef8, array from +0x18f00, flag from +0x18f21.

FUN_1001eeb60.desc: simplified profile popup — creates 0x4458-byte popup via FUN_100220a38
FUN_1001eeb60.notes: One of 3 profile openers. Redirected to FUN_100221f98 by dylib.

FUN_1001f505c.desc: guest-gated profile opener — calls FUN_100220d08 or FUN_100221f98
FUN_1001f505c.notes: Has guest gate. Calls different profile panel based on guest status.

FUN_1001fa7b0.desc: simplified profile card — always creates simplified popup
FUN_1001fa7b0.notes: Third profile opener. Redirected to full profile by dylib.

FUN_100221f98.desc: full profile panel — creates 0x28848-byte profile panel
FUN_100221f98.notes: The target all profile openers are redirected to. Called with 'homepanel_profile_avatar'.

FUN_100220a38.desc: popup creation — creates 0x4458-byte simplified popup object

FUN_100220d08.desc: profile display variant — called by guest-gated opener

FUN_1001fd570.desc: main menu constructor — creates panels, registers with sidebar

layout.+0xe8: MARKET panel object (size 0x2cf68, contains PARTY at +0x2c50)
layout.+0xf0: small SOCIAL panel object (CE-gated, created by thunk_FUN_10020cfb8)

FUN_1001fd570.notes: Root of entire sidebar/panel hierarchy. DAT_101dc2920 = root parent, *(parent+0x80) = menuObj.

FUN_1001fc9c4.desc: register sidebar panel — FUN_1001fc9c4(sidebarCtrl, panelSubObj, index)
FUN_1001fc9c4.notes: Called to register HOME(0), BAG(1), ACADEMY(2), PARTY(3), SOCIAL(4) with sidebar.

FUN_10020cfb8.notes: Creates social panel stored at menuObj+0xf0. CE-gated (never registered in CE).

FUN_10020a500.desc: social panel feature — returns early when gate=1
FUN_10020a500.notes: Original returns early. Dylib calls inner function FUN_100209ff0 directly.

FUN_100209ff0.desc: social panel inner function — actual work
FUN_100209ff0.notes: Called directly by dylib hook bypassing gate in FUN_10020a500.

FUN_100222878.notes: Dylib forces all ranked tab visibility bits and display flags after original runs.

FUN_10025d954.desc: profile body display — gates visibility of profile body elements

layout.+0x1d0: profile body setup offset (passed to FUN_100227fb8)

FUN_10025d3f0.desc: profile data loader — called when opening profile
FUN_10025d3f0.notes: Dylib hides create-account button, ensures profile sections stay visible.

FUN_100227fb8.desc: profile body setup — skipped for guests by gate
FUN_100227fb8.notes: Called as FUN_100227fb8(self+0x1d0, 1) by profile body hook.

FUN_10023bd9c.notes: Calls setTabVisible, registers season trophy tooltips, handles guild/team trophy display.

FUN_10024e4a4.notes: Gate blocks additional market tab and filter.

FUN_100242e6c.notes: Size 0x9ca0. Never created in CE because FUN_100131560 returns 1. +0x2c88 = subobject for sidebar registration.

FUN_10025129c.notes: Checks gate + platform. If returns early, skill tier icon/text never set.

FUN_100168220.notes: Gate blocks additional data fetch at +0x278. Inner fetch: FUN_100169cec.

FUN_100131560.notes: 116 callers identified. Cannot be patched (read-only __TEXT). All callers treat return 1 as CE mode. 197 references across 25 function files.

FUN_10014e20c.desc: isGuest check — returns 1 if guest, 0 if account
FUN_10014e20c.notes: Derived from FUN_1004ef1b4() which calls vtable[12](). Result ^ 1 = isGuest.

FUN_1004fe5ec.notes: Checks if account string at self+0x2bd0 is empty. Returns 0 (guest) or 1 (has account). Vtable at __DATA.__const+0x149e440, slot 12 at offset 0x60.

FUN_1001f59e8.desc: BAG constructor — creates 6 tabs always, 4 more when gate=0
FUN_1001f59e8.notes: CE-gated tabs include TROPHIES. Tab registration via FUN_1002afb68.

FUN_10021844c.notes: Created by dylib for BAG panel. SubObj at tab+0x28 used for registration.

FUN_1002afb68.desc: tab registration — FUN_1002afb68(container, title, 0, icon, section)
FUN_1002afb68.notes: Registers a tab with its container. Called for BAG trophies tab.

FUN_1001f5d50.notes: arr_add(tabArray, &subObj) — adds tab to BAG's tab array at wrapper+0x48.

FUN_10012c5b0.notes: Writes int to persistent KV store. Used for ranked data (ELO buckets).

FUN_10012c8f0.notes: Reads int from KV store. Profile card reads skill tier from 'new5v5RankedDataEloBucket'.
